ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trial_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the interval */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the interval */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interval or observations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interval was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interval was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interval when the data was collected */,
  "Zmax" REAL /* Maximum observed effect */,
  "Zmin" REAL /* Minimum observed effect */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Statistical measure of the data */,
  "selected_num" REAL /* Number of subjects selected for the interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "data_point_type" TEXT /* Type of data point (e.g., efficacy, safety, biomarker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES trial_intervals ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "trial_group" TEXT /* Trial group to which the subject belongs (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject provided informed consent */,
  "screening_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject was screened for eligibility */,
  "randomization_date" TEXT /* Date when the subject was randomized to a trial group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinical trial data */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject from whom the data was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "observation" TEXT /* Observations or notes from the collection */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the researcher who collected the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the researcher belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial management entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinical trial */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher responsible for the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the trial protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_management_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the record that was changed */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the researcher who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the researcher to whom the permission applies */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table to which the permission applies */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the researcher has read access to the table */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the researcher has write access to the table */,
  "delete_access" INTEGER /* Whether the researcher has delete access to the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinical trial */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the trial */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the trial */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., randomized controlled trial, observational study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_metadata_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trial_management ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data standard entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinical trial */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the data standard */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the data standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_standards_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trial_management ("trial_id")
)
